feedback.details: Both files exist at exact paths: edge-functions/c2-container.md and deployment.md with .md extensions. Verified via Glob and Read tools.

deployment.md contains complete Nomad job spec: SHA256 hash (line 47), CPU 2000 MHz (line 59), memory 4096 MB (line 60), port 8080 (line 49), Consul service 'llm-switch' (line 76), Vault agent templating with paths (lines 122-130), HTTP health check with /health path and 10s interval (lines 80-84).

CRITICAL GAPS: (1) JWT extraction algorithm not specified - edge-functions/c2-container.md:61 mentions 'JWT token extraction and expiration validation' but does not document the specific cryptographic algorithm (e.g., HS256, RS256, ES256) required by the contract. (2) Exact 401/403 JSON structures not documented - lines 69-71 show generic error format but lack explicit documentation of the exact field names ('error', 'message') and values for unauthorized/forbidden responses.
deployment.md: count=3 (line 12), CPU threshold 80% (line 37), round-robin (line 255). edge-functions/c2-container.md: max_connections=100, timeout=30s (line 74). All requirements met.

deployment.md: /metrics endpoint with http_requests_total and http_request_duration_seconds (lines 242-243), /health returning HTTP 200 with {"status":"healthy"} (line 244), structured JSON logging with [timestamp, level, message, trace_id, service_name] in RFC3339 format (line 245).

CRITICAL VIOLATION: Lists in deployment.md use '- ' bullet format (lines 242-254) instead of required '4-space indentation'. H1-H3 hierarchy is correct (line 1 H1, lines 193-266 H2 sections). Fenced code blocks have language identifiers (hcl, yaml, json). No trailing whitespace detected.

deployment.md:276-282 cites PRD sections: P99 latency <500ms (PRD 3.1, line 276), 99.9% availability with circuit breaker timeout=30s (PRD 3.2, line 277), SHA-256 hashing for API keys (PRD 4.6, line 278), HTTP-only headers Strict-Transport-Security and X-Content-Type-Options (PRD 4.6, line 281), Vault/Consul TLS (PRD 4.6, line 282).

deployment.md:267-273 documents HTTP 500 (line 267), 429 (line 268), 404 (line 269) with JSON structure {"error":"code","message":"text","timestamp":"RFC3339"}. Exponential backoff retry: base=100ms, max=5s, maxAttempts=3 (line 272). Graceful degradation when Vault unreachable (line 273).

edge-functions/c2-container.md:64 documents expired token handling returning 401. deployment.md:260 CORS policy with exact allowed origins (https://llm-switch.service.consul, https://api.internal.example.com). deployment.md:262 IP whitelist for Consul. deployment.md:263 Vault TTL 24h for secret rotation.

overall_summary: The Sprint 6 architecture files demonstrate substantial completeness with three criteria at 10/10 and two failing to meet threshold. Edge Function Authentication Flow (8/10, threshold 9.5) lacks the specific JWT cryptographic algorithm (HS256/RS256) and explicit 401/403 JSON field documentation. Markdown Syntax (6/10, threshold 9.0) violates the 4-space indentation requirement for lists, using standard '- ' bullets instead. The Nomad job specification, scaling configuration, observability endpoints, PRD alignment, error handling, and security hardening criteria are fully satisfied with precise file:line references demonstrating compliance.
